title: Scutum Incantatum: Enhanced Shields
description: Adds new shield types and enchantments for more dynamic and engaging combat
body:
---
# Shield Battles Just Got More Exciting!

This datapack overhauls shield mechanics, making blocking projectiles more skillful and combat more dynamic.

For example, the Wooden Shield now has a shorter cooldown before you can raise it to guard. You can also enchant shields with abilities like Shield Bash and Parry.

However, be aware that shields no longer grant complete immunity to overwhelming damage, such as critical hits or point-blank explosions.
  
---

  
## Enchantments

![Image: A shield placed on an Enchanting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f952a89ee7053c66e1f6c10a943139d50d456ee3_0.webp)

You can apply enchantments by placing your shield on an Enchanting Table.


<details>
<summary>Examples</summary>

### Shield Bash

While holding your shield up, quickly double-tap the sprint key to dash forward, closing the distance to enemies and knocking them back.
![Image: Player dashing towards a skeleton using Shield Bash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c133d1b90502ee24a1efda37c24820ac0834fcf_0.webp)
### Parry
Blocking projectiles like arrows with precise timing will restore the shield's durability.

#### +Parry Effects

Combining the Parry enchantment with a specific Parry Effect enchantment (e.g., Spellblade Counter, Blast Counter) unlocks additional effects upon a successful parry.
![Image: Successfully parrying with an enchanted shield, creating a magic sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cca22c9a47cb9500bec5aff11acba382b5c0d03_0.webp)

</details>

## Special Shields
Crafting allows you to create Special Shields with powerful enchantments unavailable via the Enchanting Table. These shields often come with drawbacks, such as reduced durability, but mastering their unique abilities provides a significant combat advantage.


<details>
<summary>Examples</summary>

### Stream Enchantments

![Image: Crafting GUI showing a shield, Phantom Membrane, and materials for a Stream enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b7013a08eeeb00d949ec98ab600186028a23243_0.webp)
Activates continuously while guarding.

#### Blaze Stream
![Image: Guarding releases a stream of fire magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6797b385e3efee6f3341e6de1355b0811e778ca2_0.webp)

#### Poison Stream
![Image: Guarding releases a stream of poison magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15731fcd632032c333278061f166d9ad78170069_0.webp)

#### Ice Stream
![Image: A Spider frozen solid by ice magic while the player guards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831ae990b2ad8875b41b1e06e5e6ae656917b7c7_0.webp)

### Burst Enchantments
![Image: Crafting GUI showing a shield, Wind Charge, and materials for a Burst enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8513d5b3a56b651cedca272cec2f77fd86a88a6d_0.webp)
Activates upon successfully blocking an attack.

#### Ender Burst
![Image: Player teleporting behind a skeleton after blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d217d9ebc269eb07b50638d8c377745851a574a_0.webp)

#### Breeze Burst 
![Image: Zombies surrounding the player being knocked back by a burst of wind after blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee63d1ede5231b60c1650885446bd26723d31b14_0.webp)

#### Smite Burst
![Image: A skeleton's head launching towards skeletons after blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/454231cf846921e945984bc64bfadc23d256046d_0.webp)


</details>

## New Shield Recipes
This datapack adds a variety of new shields beyond the standard wooden one. All shields can perfectly block projectiles. Therefore, your choice of shield primarily affects how you handle non-projectile threats.


<details>
<summary>Shield Showcase</summary>

![Wooden Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5c71824e6160030984d0553208ae298d7b5d5c.png)  
✅ Faster to raise  
❎ Weak against high damage (e.g., weapon attacks)  


![Stone Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/006f190f5d13dde72356318f3e7d733beb411e38.png)  
✅ High damage reduction and durability  
❎ Very slow to raise


![Iron Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b7c3f2c3a30e3651ce490ce07fa68053c3ccb90.png)  
✅ 100% block against 3.5 hearts (7 damage)  
❎ Cannot perfectly block damage from Stone Sword critical hits or higher; longer stun duration after blocking strong hits  


![Diamond Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e69f731a0831e3c30d33dd737bce5e7456a4231.png)  
✅ 100% block against 4 hearts (8 damage)  
❎ Cannot perfectly block damage from Iron Sword critical hits or higher; longer stun duration after blocking strong hits  


![Golden Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5520879d6330b15d11e3b11b81b697f7c6f49dc9.png)  
✅ 100% damage reduction, similar behavior to vanilla shields  
❎ Low durability  


![Amethyst Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a514ef4e127ee7419b327e14687f0a0c12897f05.png)  
✅ Wider blocking arc (protects a larger area)  
❎ Only 70% damage reduction  


![Emerald Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f986bb816d5a165d50f49f4f4223a206f4790c32.png)  
✅ 100% damage reduction  
❎ Narrower blocking arc (protects a smaller area)  


![Lapis Lazuli Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c36fa084328146d1ab4ef1b8caf1b9cbc6212c9.png)  
✅ 100% magic damage reduction  
❎ Only 40% physical damage reduction  


![Nether Quartz Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeb1fb3a8f48b5f69b78b0aeb95d20d966b3a395.png)  
✅ 100% fire damage reduction  
❎ Only 50% physical damage reduction  


![Paper Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab3c0f715de6a8a3d575e111b807d23f3f592fa8.png)  
✅ Very fast to raise  
❎ Very low durability  


![Regenerated Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d719cbb7d6a5c6521c6bef7d1adf259148de22c.png)  
✅ Very fast blocking speed, behavior similar to pre-1.9 sword blocking  
❎ Only 50% damage reduction  


![Shield of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57cff39ef052b7334129593ba4089fc20712e9e6.png)  
✅ Grants the Totem of Undying effect upon taking fatal damage  
❎ Effect may be slightly weaker than a standard Totem; can break before activation if durability is low  

![Enchanted Copper Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4ce04122f169641f385d2a25522c0fce9f7a4fd.png)  
✅ 100% damage reduction, restores durability when blocking ranged attacks  
❎ Loses durability slowly over time while held/in use  


![Enchanted Echo Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af13c8997f8acbb4ae4a70a1e5ecb15c05f34aa8.png)  
✅ 100% damage reduction  
❎ Drains the user's HP slowly while held/in use  


</details>

---

# License

<details>
<summary>Streaming</summary>

You are free to stream or record gameplay using this datapack. However, please ensure your content adheres to Minecraft's usage guidelines, which generally require content to be freely accessible.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom Maps, Datapacks, Mods</summary>

You may include this datapack in custom maps, other datapacks, or mods under the terms of the MIT License. However, no support or warranty is provided for such integrations. Please also be aware of the Minecraft Java Edition EULA, which prohibits the sale of mods and related content.

</details>

## Disclaimer

Functionality is not guaranteed. Support cannot be provided for corrupted data or conflicts with other mods/datapacks. It is highly recommended to back up your world before installing this datapack, especially on an existing world.


## Known Issues and Specifications


<details>
<summary>Issues</summary>

The following are known issues or intended behaviors within this datapack. There are currently no plans to change these aspects.

  

Issue: Upon first login, all players are automatically assigned to the 'player' team.

> Reason: This is intentionally done to disable friendly fire from the datapack's magic effects by default.

---

Issue: Shields held in the off-hand may occasionally duplicate when in Creative mode.

> Reason: This can occur because the datapack is primarily designed and optimized for Survival and Adventure modes, prioritizing performance within those gameplay experiences.

---

Issue: The Creative inventory search tab or other modded inventories might display enchanted books with no names. Additionally, applying non-vanilla/non-datapack enchantments might remove the enchanted glint effect from items.

> Reason: These are unavoidable side effects related to the internal mechanics and processes used by the datapack to implement its features. They cannot be fixed without compromising the core functionality.


</details>



## Tips

<details>
<summary>PVP Usage</summary>

For PVP, it's recommended to assign players to one of the designated teams (e.g., illager, player, red, other) and execute the function provided below to enable team-based friendly fire logic:

```
function #untwo:update_all_player_team
```

</details>



---  
  

# Installation Instructions

<details>
<summary>Datapack - New World</summary>

When creating a new world, click "More". Click "Data Packs". Drag and drop the downloaded .zip file. Make sure to drag the entire .zip file; do not extract it.  Click the arrow on the pack icon to move it to the "Selected" list. Click "Done"   
![Image: World creation screen Data Packs interface. Datapack zip file being moved to the activation list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53da0e9c37a990c55d080052b3df0b6bd3d25eff_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>Datapack - Existing World</summary>

⚠ Warning: Issues may occur. Always back up your world first! Select your world in the singleplayer menu. Click "Edit". Click "Open World Folder". Drag and drop the downloaded .zip file into the datapacks folder. Make sure to drag the entire .zip file; do not extract it. The datapack should load the next time you open the world.   
![Image: World folder view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99b6df3d3a6053e4c4837449bf3db5fbc89a50a2.png)

</details>

### Language Files

This datapack includes support for 日本語, 繁體中文, 简体中文, and Español. Translations may be incomplete or contain errors. We appreciate any feedback or corrections submitted via our Discord server.

<details>
<summary>Language Pack (Resource Pack)</summary>

Go to Options > Resource Packs.
Drag and drop the downloaded language pack .zip file.
Click the arrow on the pack icon in the "Available" list to move it to the "Selected" list. Click "Done".
![Image: Resource Packs screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1adf64d851313e2cf8392c7d3b0129603201821.png)

</details>

### Mod Versions

The MOD version automatically activates the language pack.

<details>
<summary>Mod Version Installation</summary>

Install the .jar file like any other Minecraft mod (place it in your mods folder).

</details>




---
Found a bug? Let us know on our Discord server!
